ogTitle: Barwidgee vs Barwon Downs: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Barwidgee and Barwon Downs.
heading: Barwidgee vs Barwon Downs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Barwidgee, Victoria and Barwon Downs, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Barwon Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Barwidgee (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Barwidgee or Barwon Downs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Barwidgee has a flood risk score of 51/100, while Barwon Downs scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Barwidgee scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Barwon Downs scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Barwidgee or Barwon Downs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Barwon Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
